874 APTIT_OVREATG_FREQ_CD APTIT_OVREATG_FREQ_CD D0150E2 Mood: Poor appetite or overeating: Freq CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident, over the past two weeks, has had a poor appetite or been overeating. 0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day) effective 10/01/2023
875 FEEL_BAD_CD FEEL_BAD_CD D0150F1 Mood: Feeling bad about
